comment: Jobs padrão (espelham cron/scripts do PyTrack). prefix é aplicado a cada job pelo setup. sql usa $$...$$ implícito (o setup embrulha). Use {{LOG}} como nome da tabela de log.

jobs.name: 6h_heartbeat
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (1, '{{PREFIX}}6h_heartbeat', 'heartbeat e métricas periódicas')

jobs.name: daily_2am
jobs.description: backup e limpeza de dados temporários
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (2, '{{PREFIX}}daily_2am', 'backup e limpeza de dados temporários')

jobs.name: 10min_queue
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (3, '{{PREFIX}}10min_queue', 'processamento de filas e status')

jobs.name: hourly_sync
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (4, '{{PREFIX}}hourly_sync', 'sincronização e atualização de dashboards')

jobs.name: weekly_report
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (5, '{{PREFIX}}weekly_report', 'relatórios semanais e consolidação')

jobs.name: monthly_close
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (6, '{{PREFIX}}monthly_close', 'fechamento mensal e arquivamento')

jobs.name: daily_cleanup
jobs.sql: delete from {{LOG}} where ran_at < now() - interval '90 days'; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (7, '{{PREFIX}}daily_cleanup', 'limpeza de dados antigos e logs')

jobs.name: daily_backup
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (8, '{{PREFIX}}daily_backup', 'backup automático do banco')

jobs.name: weekly_reindex
jobs.sql: analyze; insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (9, '{{PREFIX}}weekly_reindex', 'reindexação e otimização do banco')

jobs.name: batch_3x_daily
jobs.sql: insert into {{LOG}}(num, job_name, description) values (10, '{{PREFIX}}batch_3x_daily', 'processamento em lote')
